# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yaml: |
    admin:
      accessLogPath: /dev/stdout
    controller:
      namespace: linkerd
    telemetry:
      namespace: linkerd

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: controller
        image: buoyantio/linkerd-controller
        volumeMounts:
        - name: linkerd-config
          mountPath: /etc/linkerd/config
      volumes:
      - name: linkerd-config
        configMap:
          name: linkerd-config

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller-api
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    deployment: linkerd-controller
  ports:
  - port: 8085
    targetPort: 8085

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yaml: |
    admin:
      accessLogPath: /dev/stdout
    proxy:
      inbound:
        - port: 4143
          protocol: tls
      outbound:
        - port: 4140
          protocol: tls
    policy:
      - name: server
        targets:
          - "your-service.namespace.svc.cluster.local"
        authorizations:
          - authentication:
              token:
                template: header
                header: authorization
          - name: authorization
            pathRegex: "/api/.*"
            methods:
              - GET
              - POST

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: your-service
  namespace: your-namespace
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: your-service
        image: your-service-image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
